metadata.name: cost_model_prefill_a5_plan_calibrated
metadata.purpose: Plan-level calibration using Prefill-A5 S0-S6 evidence, restricted to the current four-plan parameter space.
metadata.notes: This config does not claim component-level msprof calibration. It only applies weak latency multipliers for plan-level events observed in Prefill-A5: mixed_cv disabled, auto_cv_balance, and prefill tile_mix 4:1. IR rewrite/code motion stages are intentionally excluded.

plan_level_latency_priors.scope: current four-plan parameters only; excludes dtype/workspace, SSA reuse, hoist, compiler code motion
